sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Guardian Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Guardian in humanoid form during Labyrinth exploration (action-adventure) and spaceship form during Dungeon segments (shoot 'em up). Form changes based on location within Naju.

special_mechanics.name: Top-Down Movement
special_mechanics.description: Humanoid form movement uses top-down perspective with screen-wide passages and room-based navigation plotted as X-Y coordinates.

tier_notes: Tier 2: No quantitative movement physics data available in documentation. Sources provide gameplay mechanics, level structure, and controls information but lack specific velocity, acceleration, or gravity values. Game praised for 'responsive controls' but no technical parameters documented.
